title: Biologists
description: Research or study basic principles of plant and animal life, such as origin, relationship, development, anatomy, and functions.

tasks.text: Program and use computers to store, process, and analyze data.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Prepare technical and research reports, such as environmental impact reports, and communicate the results to individuals in industry, government, or the general public.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Supervise biological technicians and technologists and other scientists.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop and maintain liaisons and effective working relations with groups and individuals, agencies, and the public to encourage cooperative management strategies or to develop information and interpret findings.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify, classify, and study structure, behavior, ecology, physiology, nutrition, culture, and distribution of plant and animal species.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Study basic principles of plant and animal life, such as origin, relationship, development, anatomy, and function.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collect and analyze biological data about relationships among and between organisms and their environment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Review reports and proposals, such as those relating to land use classifications and recreational development, for accuracy, adequacy, or adherence to policies, regulations, or scientific standards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Write grant proposals to obtain funding for biological research.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Teach or supervise students and perform research at universities and colleges.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare requests for proposals or statements of work.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Communicate test results to state and federal representatives and general public.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Represent employer in a technical capacity at conferences.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Research environmental effects of present and potential uses of land and water areas, determining methods of improving environmental conditions or such outputs as crop yields.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Study aquatic plants and animals and environmental conditions affecting them, such as radioactivity or pollution.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Study and manage wild animal populations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare plans for management of renewable resources.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Measure salinity, acidity, light, oxygen content, and other physical conditions of water to determine their relationship to aquatic life.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop pest management and control measures, and conduct risk assessments related to pest exclusion, using scientific methods.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop methods and apparatus for securing representative plant, animal, aquatic, or soil samples.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan and administer biological research programs for government, research firms, medical industries, or manufacturing firms.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Study reactions of plants, animals, and marine species to parasites.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
